header_21.raw_response: I tend to be someone who plans ahead and tries to avoid last-minute stress, but I also know that life doesn’t always go as planned. I’ve had moments where I’ve had to work late or rush to meet a deadline, especially when helping my brother with his college applications or managing my job and family responsibilities. However, I generally prefer to complete tasks early to avoid the stress of a last-minute burst. My values include responsibility and preparation, so I lean more toward the early completion side of the spectrum.
